benchmark.dataset_summary: 45 one- and two-dimensional observables across two toroidal-field directions.
benchmark.name: TCV-X21 diverted L-mode reference case

references.label: GBS code verification and MMS reference

profile_metrics.description: Match absolute magnitude and profile shape at OMP and divertor targets.
profile_metrics.name: absolute_profile_agreement

profile_metrics.description: Fit density and temperature decay lengths on the outboard midplane profile window.
profile_metrics.name: omp_length_scales

profile_metrics.description: Track LFS/HFS target peak position shifts under field reversal when the benchmark bundle is extended.
profile_metrics.name: target_peak_location

verification_requirements.description: Require MMS/order-of-accuracy evidence on the promoted operators before claiming native 3D closure.
verification_requirements.name: manufactured_solution_convergence

verification_requirements.description: Require a reduced selected-field compare surface before broad benchmark claims.
verification_requirements.name: field_parity_surface

verification_requirements.description: Require restart equivalence and artifact provenance alongside benchmark plots.
verification_requirements.name: restart_and_provenance
